secondaryKeywords: professional website design for service providers
seo.metaTitle: Custom Website Design for SMBs | White-Label WordPress | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Offer fully custom WordPress websites under your brand. Hostopia's white-label design service handles discovery through launch — no in-house agency required.

hero.headline: Premium Custom Websites — Delivered Under Your Brand, Built by Our Team
hero.subheadline: Not every SMB fits into a template. Some need advanced functionality, complex site structures, or a brand presence that stands completely on its own.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label custom website design service lets you offer fully bespoke WordPress websites without building an in-house design agency. Our team manages discovery through launch — you own the customer relationship.

items.title: Built from scratch
items.body: No templates — a fully custom website designed around their brand, business goals, and audience.

items.title: WordPress foundation
items.body: Built on WordPress for flexibility, scalability, and the ability to extend with plugins and integrations.

items.title: Collaborative process
items.body: Direct collaboration with professional designers through a structured discovery, design, and revision process.

items.title: Full ownership
items.body: The SMB owns the website, content, and database. Optional hosting and maintenance plans keep it running.

features.heading: A Managed Design Service — Without Managing Designers
features.intro: You sell the service. We handle everything from initial discovery through launch and ongoing maintenance.

cards.title: Structured Discovery & Proposal
cards.body: Every project starts with a documented discovery process and detailed proposal — so scope, timeline, and pricing are clear before work begins.

cards.title: Mobile-Responsive, SEO-Ready Architecture
cards.body: Every site ships responsive, fast, and optimized for search engines from day one. Built to perform on every device and in every market.

cards.title: Advanced Functionality & Integrations
cards.body: Third-party integrations, custom forms, booking systems, ecommerce — whatever the SMB's business requires, the build supports it.

cards.title: Optional Maintenance & Hosting
cards.body: Ongoing plans cover updates, backups, security patches, and hosting — turning a one-time project into recurring revenue.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Compete with Local Agencies — Without Building One
partnerAdvantage.intro: Custom Website Design lets you serve the SMBs that outgrow templated solutions and need a higher-touch experience.

items.title: Move upmarket without headcount
items.body: Offer premium custom builds alongside your DIY website builder — no need to hire designers, developers, or project managers.

items.title: Bundle into higher-value packages
items.body: Custom builds pair naturally with hosting, SSL, SEO, and ongoing maintenance — creating multi-product engagements with stronger retention.

items.title: Position as a full-service digital partner
items.body: Offering custom design alongside your existing services signals to SMBs that you can support them at every stage of digital maturity.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Premium Tier in Your Website Portfolio
lifecycleFit.intro: Custom Website Design serves the top of your website portfolio — SMBs who need more than a builder but don't want to manage an agency relationship on their own.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Website Builder for DIY customers, DIFM for hands-off, Custom for complex needs.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive visibility.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Custom websites anchor ecommerce, integrations, and premium digital services.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position custom design as the upgrade path for SMBs outgrowing templates, the agency alternative for businesses needing advanced functionality, and a premium bundling anchor alongside hosting, security, and marketing services.

cta.headline: Ready to Deliver Premium Custom Websites at Scale?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch white-label custom website design, expand your digital portfolio into higher-value engagements, and strengthen long-term SMB relationships.
